provenance: Column taxonomy derived from APQC Retail Process Classification Framework and SCOR value-chain concepts. Domain rows remain capability nouns; lifecycle columns are operating-flow verbs.

domains.label: Ordering
domains.description: Supplier ordering, order cadence, cut-off times, order generation and ordering controls.

domains.label: Receiving, Returns and Recalls
domains.description: Inbound receiving, returns, recalls, delivery handling and goods movement controls.

domains.label: GRIR and Invoice Reconciliation
domains.description: Goods-received invoice reconciliation, matching, payment readiness and invoice exception control.

domains.label: Stock Management
domains.description: Inventory, stock availability, stock movement, stock accuracy and downstream stock controls.

domains.label: Trading
domains.description: Trading support, trading operations, commercial readiness and trading-facing process controls.

domains.label: Ranging
domains.description: Range decisions, assortment setup, article lists, category range and sellability readiness.

domains.label: Sales
domains.description: Sales channels, point-of-sale behaviour, consumer-facing data and sales-system readiness.

domains.label: Business Day Management
domains.description: Business calendars, trading days, operating days, exception days and calendar ownership.

domains.label: Site Closure
domains.description: Temporary or permanent site closure events and the operational exceptions that follow them.

domains.label: Promotions
domains.description: Promotional setup, promotional pricing, campaigns, offers and promotion readiness.

domains.label: Specials
domains.description: Special items, non-stock lines, fuel, exceptional item handling and specialist mappings.

domains.label: Forecasting and Replenishment
domains.description: Demand forecasting, replenishment logic, schedule consumption and downstream planning signals.

lifecycle_stages.label: Plan & Govern
lifecycle_stages.description: Planning, demand, forecasting, governance, policy, budgeting, approval and strategic operating decisions.

lifecycle_stages.label: Configure
lifecycle_stages.description: Configuration, setup, master-data record creation, attributes, parameters, ranging and price/tax setup.

lifecycle_stages.label: Source & Replenish
lifecycle_stages.description: Ordering, purchasing, procurement, sourcing, replenishment, reorder logic, allocation and supplier-side supply flow.

lifecycle_stages.label: Receive & Control
lifecycle_stages.description: Receiving, goods receipt, delivery, returns, recalls, inventory control, stock counts and put-away control.

lifecycle_stages.label: Sell & Operate
lifecycle_stages.description: Selling, trading, promotional execution, special-item operation, forecourt and point-of-sale business operation.

lifecycle_stages.label: Reconcile & Close
lifecycle_stages.description: Invoice matching, GRIR, reconciliation, close, end-of-day, settlement, variance and period/site closure activity.

lifecycle_stages.label: Assure & Improve
lifecycle_stages.description: Assurance, audit, compliance, quality review, exceptions, corrective action, monitoring and continuous improvement.
